instructions: Choose the best answer for each question. You may use a basic calculator. You have 15 minutes to complete this section.

items.text: A product's price increases from ₹400 to ₹480. What is the percentage increase?
If 3 workers complete a task in 12 days, how many days will 4 workers take (same rate)?
A train covers 360 km in 4 hours. What is its average speed in km/h?
A company's revenue was ₹12 lakhs in Q1 and ₹15 lakhs in Q2. What is the quarter-on-quarter growth rate?
A laptop originally priced at ₹60,000 is offered at 10% off, then an additional 5% off on the discounted price. What is the final price?
₹5,000 is invested at 8% simple interest per annum. What is the total amount after 3 years?
A pie chart shows: Marketing 25%, Engineering 35%, Sales 20%, Support 20%. If the total budget is ₹80 lakhs, how much goes to Engineering?
The ratio of boys to girls in a class is 3:5. If there are 40 students in total, how many boys are there?
A shopkeeper buys 50 items at ₹20 each and sells them at ₹28 each. What is the total profit percentage?
Population of a city grows at 5% per year. If the current population is 2,00,000, what will it be after 2 years (compound growth)?
A tank is filled by Pipe A in 6 hours and by Pipe B in 8 hours. If both pipes are opened simultaneously, how long to fill the tank?
A bar chart shows quarterly sales: Q1=120, Q2=150, Q3=135, Q4=195. What is the average quarterly sale and which quarter deviated most from it?
Two cars start from the same point travelling in opposite directions at 60 km/h and 80 km/h. After how many hours will they be 490 km apart?
A company's profit tripled each year for 3 years starting from ₹1 lakh. The company paid 30% tax on profit each year. What is the total post-tax profit over 3 years?
